title: PRENATAL AND POSTPARTUM CARE - 211info
text: OASIS CENTER OF THE ROGUE VALLEY PRENATAL AND POSTPARTUM CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Specializes in working with parents with substance use disorders. Provides prenatal and postpartum care, Medication-Assisted Treatment, family support services, and care coordination. 534 East Main Street Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Pregnant women and parents experiencing substance use disorders who have children under 6 years old Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-2pm Email (541) 200-1530 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 200-1530 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Sliding scale fees. Accepts OHP and can provide a financial assistance application. DOCUMENTS: Insurance cards if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Perinatal Substance Use Disorder Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OASIS CENTER OF THE ROGUE VALLEY
